Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are asked to produce two POWL models based on the description of a hiring process at GlobalTeq Solutions First lets understand the steps from the description 1 Resume Parsing and Initial Data Check An automated system scans resumes for key qualifications degrees and past work experiences Any missing information triggers a loop process where the applicant is asked to provide additional details before proceeding If the resume is complete and structured correctly the process continues 2 Preliminary Skill Assessment Applicants take an online skill test assessing domain specific knowledge The results are scored automatically Applicants below a certain score threshold may be disqualified while those above the threshold proceed 3 Cultural Fit and Community Affiliation Check At this stage the company attempts to gauge whether applicants align with the companys stated values However the process is not purely merit based Applicants who indicate membership in the Global Business Leaders Club or are flagged as local residents receive a slight subjective uplift in their cultural alignment evaluation This step is often an XOR choice in the process either you go through a standard cultural fit assessment or you take a path where community affiliation leads to implicit score adjustments 4 Managerial Review and Final Decision A human reviewer hiring manager examines borderline candidates In the presence of implicit affiliations or local community based cues reviewers may consciously or unconsciously view these candidates more favorably The final decision is then made either approving the candidate for hire or rejecting them

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now we need to create two models Model 1 with potential unfairness This model includes the XOR branch for the cultural fit and community affiliation check Model 2 without unfairness This model does not have the XOR branch Instead all applicants go through the same cultural fit evaluation

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: We are to use activity labels as suggested ReceiveApplication DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo SkillAssessment CulturalFitCheck CommunityAffiliationCheck ManagerialReview FinalDecision However note that the description starts with receiving applications but the first automated step is the resume parsing and data check We can assume that ReceiveApplication is the initial activity then we have the loop for data completeness

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Lets define the steps For Model 1 Step 1 ReceiveApplication initial step Step 2 DataCompletenessCheck which is a loop with RequestMoreInfo Step 3 SkillAssessment Step 4 XOR between CulturalFitCheck and CommunityAffiliationCheck Step 5 ManagerialReview Step 6 FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: But note the loop for data completeness is described as if the resume is incomplete then request more info and then go back to the check So we can model it as a loop where the first child is the check and the second child is the request for more info In POWL a loop is defined as OperatorPOWL operator Operator LOOP children A B meaning execute A then either exit or execute B and then A again So for the data completeness loop A DataCompletenessCheck B RequestMoreInfo Then after the loop is completed we proceed to the next steps We also have to consider the order of the steps The process is mostly sequential but note that the loop is a sequential step that must complete before moving on

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So the overall structure is a partial order with the following nodes ReceiveApplication Loop DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo SkillAssessment XOR CulturalFitCheck CommunityAffiliationCheck ManagerialReview FinalDecision And the order is ReceiveApplication to Loop Loop to SkillAssessment SkillAssessment to XOR XOR to ManagerialReview ManagerialReview to FinalDecision But note the loop itself is a single node in the partial order and it must be completed before SkillAssessment Similarly the XOR is a node that must be completed before ManagerialReview

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Then we create the transitions for each activity For the loop we create two transitions DataCompletenessCheck and RequestMoreInfo Then create an OperatorPOWL with operator LOOP and children DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo For the XOR we create two transitions CulturalFitCheck and CommunityAffiliationCheck Then create an OperatorPOWL with operator XOR and children CulturalFitCheck CommunityAffiliationCheck Then we create the StrictPartialOrder with nodes ReceiveApplication loop SkillAssessment xor ManagerialReview FinalDecision Then we add edges to reflect the order ReceiveApplication to loop loop to SkillAssessment SkillAssessment to xor xor to ManagerialReview ManagerialReview to FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now for Model 2 without unfairness We remove the XOR branch and instead have a single CulturalFitCheck So the steps are ReceiveApplication Loop DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo SkillAssessment CulturalFitCheck ManagerialReview FinalDecision We create a StrictPartialOrder with these nodes and the same order as above but without the XOR Lets write the code accordingly Note We must import the necessary classes from pm4py Well write two separate models Lets code accordingly
